elements.title: lang::report_page_021_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_u.id,
       CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname) as user,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_u.timecreated,
       sub.grade,
       sub.courses,
       sub.completed_courses,
       kbi_lit.timespend                        AS timespend,
       kbi_lit.visits                           AS visits
FROM mdl_user kbi_u
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ue.userid,
                         ROUND(AVG(CASE
                                     WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                                     ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) AS grade,
                         COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_e.courseid)             as courses,
                         COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cc.course)              as completed_courses
                  FROM mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.id = kbi_ue.enrolid
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completions kbi_cc
                           ON kbi_cc.timecompleted > 0 AND kbi_cc.course = kbi_e.courseid AND kbi_cc.userid = kbi_ue.userid
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course' AND kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_e.courseid
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g
                           ON kbi_g.userid = kbi_ue.userid AND kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
                  WHERE kbi_ue.userid > 0
                    AND kbi_ue.status = 0
                    AND kbi_e.status = 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_ue.userid) sub ON sub.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_lit.userid, SUM(kbi_lil.timespend) as timespend, SUM(kbi_lil.visits) as visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit
                         JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_track_log kbi_lil ON kbi_lil.trackid = kbi_lit.id
                  WHERE kbi_lil.id > 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_lit.userid) lit ON kbi_lit.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_u.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
